meta.feed_title: Al Jazeera – Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera

items.title: Iran war: What’s happening on day 66 as Trump announces Hormuz mission?
items.summary: Trump orders new Hormuz mission after Iran says it receives US response to its peace proposal.

items.title: Japan PM: Hormuz closure ‘inflicting enormous impact’ on Asia Pacific
items.summary: Japan’s PM says the effective closure of the Strait of Hormuz is ‘inflicting an ‘enormous impact’ on Asia Pacific.

items.title: Iran warns US to stay out of Hormuz after Trump says US will ‘guide’ ships
items.summary: President Trump said the US will begin Project Freedom on Monday to guide stranded ships out of the Strait of Hormuz.

items.title: Crew of Iranian ship seized by US forces evacuated to Pakistan, gov’t says
items.summary: Twenty-two crew members from the seized Iranian ship MV Touska have been transferred to Pakistan for repatriation.

items.title: Former NYC Mayor Giuliani hospitalised in ‘critical condition’
items.summary: Spokesman says Giuliani in 'critical but stable' condition as President Trump hails 'true warrior'.

items.title: Japan PM says Iran war oil crisis having ‘enormous impact’ in Asia Pacific
items.summary: Sanae Takaichi makes comments during a visit to Australia, where she signs agreements on energy supplies.

items.title: North Korean women’s club to play rare football match in the South
items.summary: Naegohyang FC will play the South's Suwon FC on May 20 in the semifinal of the Women's Asian Champions League.

items.title: All-round hero Hardie helps Babar Azam’s Peshawar Zalmi win PSL 2026
items.summary: Hardie's 4 wickets and 56 runs help secure Peshawar's second PSL title with a five-wicket win over Hyderabad Kingsmen.

items.title: How to escape Russia’s army: Soldiers serving in Ukraine seek a way out
items.summary: Russia's army faces a desertion crisis as it continues to use waves of soldiers to attack Ukraine's defensive positions.

items.title: Fireworks in Milan as Inter clinch Serie A title with a 2-0 win over Parma
items.summary: Inter Milan win their 21st Scudetto, edging Napoli, with three matches remaining in the Italian football league season.

items.title: Detained Gaza aid flotilla activists arrive in Netherlands
items.summary: Two activists from the Global Sumud Flotilla arrived in the Netherlands after being released from Israeli custody.

items.title: Trump says US to begin ‘guiding’ ships in Strait of Hormuz
items.summary: US President Donald Trump has announced a naval mission to 'guide' stranded ships through the Strait of Hormuz.

items.title: Oil prices flat as Trump’s plan for Strait of Hormuz fails to calm market
items.summary: Brent crude is largely unmoved by Trump's announcement of the operation, dubbed 'Project Freedom'.

items.title: Illegal ‘free party’ at French military site draws up to 40,000 ravers
items.summary: Tens of thousands of partygoers gathered for an illegal “free party” at a military firing range near Bourges.

items.title: Iran war live: Iranian military warns US of attacks over Hormuz mission
items.summary: Iran protests as Trump announces 'Project Freedom' to free stranded ships out of the Strait of Hormuz.

items.title: Thousands in India’s Manipur mark three years since ethnic clashes began
items.summary: Thousands of protesters gathered in India’s Manipur state to mark three years since ethnic violence erupted.

items.title: Three dead in suspected hantavirus outbreak on Atlantic cruise ship
items.summary: Three of six passengers ill from a suspected rodent-transmitted virus have died, and one is in intensive care, WHO says.

items.title: French left-wing’s Melenchon says he will run for president in 2027
items.summary: Melenchon says he will make fourth bid for presidency with President Macron term-limited and Le Pen facing ban.

items.title: Real Madrid stays alive in La Liga title race with victory at Espanyol
items.summary: Two goals by Vinicius Jr allowed Madrid to remain in title contention with Barcelona ahead of El Clasico next Sunday.

items.title: Iran lawmaker says Strait of Hormuz will not return to pre‑war state
items.summary: Iran says the Strait of Hormuz will never return to the status quo that existed before the US-Israel war on Tehran.

items.title: Trump says US will ‘help free up’ ships stuck in Hormuz Strait
items.summary: US president says any interference with operation, which will start on Monday, will 'have to be dealt with forcefully'.

items.title: Is Mali’s military government losing control?
items.summary: A coalition of armed groups and rebels challenges the military government's authority.

items.title: Kimi Antonelli wins Miami GP to extend F1 title lead
items.summary: Nineteen-year-old becomes the first driver in F1 history to convert his first three pole positions into race victories.

items.title: World Press Freedom Day marked in Gaza as journalist death toll rises
items.summary: Palestinian journalists in Gaza marked World Press Freedom Day by honouring colleagues killed and targeted by Israel.

items.title: Is Israel expanding into Gaza despite ceasefire?
items.summary: Redi Tlhabi speaks to Ray Adams Row Farr from Forensic Architecture about Israel’s expansion into Gaza post-ceasefire.
